overall.description: Gameplay footage from a bus simulator showing a first-person perspective from the driver's seat during heavy rain. The bus travels along city streets, stopping at designated bus stops to pick up passengers before continuing the route through wet urban roads.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane city street with bus stop approach

agents.ego_description: driving bus through heavy rain on multi-lane city street, windshield wipers active maintaining visibility

entered.detail: rain-soaked multi-lane road with visible puddles and reflections
contemporary glass and concrete buildings lining the left side of the street
mature deciduous trees with green foliage along the sidewalk
glass and metal bus shelter with bench visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The bus drives through heavy rain on a multi-lane city street. Modern office buildings line the left side while trees line the right. The windshield wipers move continuously to clear the heavy rain. A bus stop shelter approaches in the distance on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: bus stop shelter with waiting and boarding passengers

events.description: bus comes to a complete stop at the designated bus stop
front door opens to allow waiting passengers to board
doors close and bus prepares to depart from the stop

agents.ego_description: stopped at bus stop with doors open, monitoring passengers as they board the vehicle

notable_agents.action: passenger entering bus through front door, holding bag
waiting passenger standing under shelter waiting to board

entered.detail: yellow pole with bus route information and stop identifier
grey concrete seating at the bus shelter

segments.scene_description: The bus stops at the first bus stop where passengers are waiting under the shelter. The door opens and passengers board while the rain continues to fall. The bus stop features a glass shelter, concrete bench, and route signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street with traffic intersection and tree-lined avenue

events.description: bus approaches and navigates through intersection with traffic lights
bus executes left turn at intersection and continues on new street

agents.ego_description: driving through wet streets, navigating intersection with traffic lights and other vehicles

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving in adjacent lane through the intersection

entered.detail: large intersection with overhead traffic signals and crosswalk markings
tall modern tower visible in the distance through the rain
second bus shelter visible ahead on the right side of the road

segments.scene_description: The bus departs from the first stop and drives through the city, approaching a major intersection. The vehicle turns left at the traffic lights, passing other cars on the wet roads. A second bus stop becomes visible in the distance as the bus continues along the tree-lined avenue.

scene_state.functional_zone: second bus stop on tree-lined street

events.description: bus pulls to a stop at the second bus stop
door opens to allow passenger to board
passenger finishes boarding and doors close

agents.ego_description: stopped at second bus stop, passenger in red shirt boarding the vehicle

notable_agents.action: passenger in red shirt and shorts boarding through front door

entered.detail: yellow bus stop sign pole with route information
concrete seating platform at the shelter

segments.scene_description: The bus stops at a second bus stop where a passenger in a red shirt is waiting. The passenger boards quickly while the rain continues. The shelter and surrounding trees are visible on the right side of the vehicle.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane city street with parked cars

agents.ego_description: accelerating away from bus stop, continuing route through rainy city streets with moderate traffic

entered.detail: line of parked vehicles along the right curb including a pink sedan

segments.scene_description: The bus pulls away from the second stop and continues driving through the rainy urban environment. Parked cars line the right side of the street while the bus navigates through light traffic on the wet asphalt.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a bus driver's seat as the vehicle navigates a rain-slicked city route between multiple passenger stops. It begins with the bus driving through heavy rain past modern office buildings and trees, with windshield wipers working constantly as a glass bus shelter approaches on the right. As the bus pulls over, the scene shifts to the boarding process at the first stop before the vehicle departs and turns left at a major intersection, passing other cars on the wet asphalt. The camera then tracks the approach to a second stop where a passenger in a red shirt boards, with the surrounding greenery and shelter framing the right side of the view. Finally, the bus pulls away from the curb and continues through the rainy urban environment, weaving through light traffic past rows of parked cars.
